_comment: Samsung OLED connector SOP — 40 atomic steps (v2.0, expanded from 12-step v1.3)

steps.name: Login: Click LOGIN
steps.description: Click the LOGIN button to open the authentication dialog

steps.name: Login: Click PW Field
steps.description: Click inside the password input field to focus it

steps.name: Login: Type Password
steps.description: Type the authentication password (default: 1111 from config)

steps.name: Login: Confirm
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm the password and complete login

steps.name: Recipe: Open Menu
steps.description: Click RECIPE MENU button to load connector recipe file

steps.name: Recipe: Wait Load
steps.description: Wait 1 second for recipe list to fully load

steps.name: Recipe: Confirm Selection
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm recipe selection

steps.name: Mold Left: Click Tab
steps.description: Click MOLD LEFT tab to activate left mold ROI configuration

steps.name: Mold Left: Wait Open
steps.description: Wait 500ms for mold left panel to open

steps.name: Mold Left: Drag ROI
steps.description: Drag to define the left mold inspection ROI boundary

steps.name: Mold Left: Confirm
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm and save the left mold ROI

steps.name: Mold Right: Click Tab
steps.description: Click MOLD RIGHT tab to activate right mold ROI configuration

steps.name: Mold Right: Wait Open
steps.description: Wait 500ms for mold right panel to open

steps.name: Mold Right: Drag ROI
steps.description: Drag to define the right mold inspection ROI boundary

steps.name: Mold Right: Confirm
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm and save the right mold ROI

steps.name: Axis-X: Click Field
steps.description: Click the AXIS-X input field to focus it

steps.name: Axis-X: Enter Value
steps.description: Clear current value and type the X-axis reference coordinate

steps.name: Axis-X: Confirm
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm the X-axis value

steps.name: Axis-Y: Click Field
steps.description: Click the AXIS-Y input field to focus it

steps.name: Axis-Y: Enter Value
steps.description: Clear current value and type the Y-axis reference coordinate

steps.name: Axis-Y: Confirm
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm the Y-axis value

steps.name: Pin Array: Navigate
steps.description: Click PIN ARRAY tab to navigate to pin inspection view

steps.name: Pin Array: Wait Settle
steps.description: Wait 500ms for pin array view to fully render

steps.name: Pin Array: Scan Validate
steps.description: YOLO26x detects connector pin positions in top half of frame

steps.name: Pin Count: Wait
steps.description: Wait 300ms before pin count validation

steps.name: Pin Count: Validate
steps.description: YOLO26x validates total connector pin count in bottom half

steps.name: Verify Left: Navigate
steps.description: Click VERIFY L tab to navigate to left connector verification

steps.name: Verify Left: Wait
steps.description: Wait 300ms for left verify panel to activate

steps.name: Verify Left: Confirm
steps.description: Click VERIFY L confirm button to accept left connector positioning

steps.name: Verify Right: Navigate
steps.description: Click VERIFY R tab to navigate to right connector verification

steps.name: Verify Right: Wait
steps.description: Wait 300ms for right verify panel to activate

steps.name: Verify Right: Confirm
steps.description: Click VERIFY R confirm button to accept right connector positioning

steps.name: Pre-Save: Wait
steps.description: Wait 300ms before save to allow UI state to settle

steps.name: Save: Click
steps.description: Click SAVE button to save the current recipe configuration

steps.name: Save: Wait Complete
steps.description: Wait 500ms for save operation to complete

steps.name: Apply: Click
steps.description: Click APPLY to commit all recipe settings to the controller

steps.name: Apply: Wait Dialog
steps.description: Wait 1 second for apply confirmation dialog to appear

steps.name: Apply: Confirm OK
steps.description: Press Enter to confirm the apply dialog and commit changes

steps.name: Open: Click Icon
steps.description: Click OPEN icon to launch the recipe in the vision system

steps.name: Open: Wait Final
steps.description: Wait 500ms for recipe open to complete — SOP sequence finished
